PORT NOTES — custom preview scrollbar + CSS transform scale (Slider / LunaSidebar)
==================================================================================
Copy these ideas into the other app if the sidebar lives inside a scaled parent
(e.g. transform: scale(...) on an artboard).

PROBLEM (plain language)
--------------------------
getBoundingClientRect() returns sizes/positions AFTER the browser applies
transform: scale. Your scrollbar uses inline "top" and a CSS variable height
in the gutter's LOCAL layout pixels. Those two spaces don't match when scale
is not 1, so the track/thumb drift or jump when the window resizes.

FIX (idea)
----------
Multiply rect-derived distances by (1 / scale) before using them for layout
inline styles. Pointer movement for dragging the thumb is in SCREEN pixels;
multiply delta-Y by (1 / scale) before applying scroll math that was derived
from layout-pixel track height.

PREREQUISITE IN THIS REPO
-------------------------
File: LunaCanvasScaleContext.jsx
- React context default value = 1 (means "no extra scale" / not wrapped).
- useLunaCanvasScale() reads the current scale.

The scaled wrapper (LunaScaledArtboard) wraps children with:
  <LunaCanvasScaleContext.Provider value={scale}>
where scale = getCanvasContainScale(viewportW, viewportH) (see canvasScale.js).

In the other app: either copy that tiny context + provider, OR pass scale as a
prop and replace useLunaCanvasScale() with that prop (default 1).

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1) IMPORT (LunaSidebar.jsx top)
--------------------------------
import { useLunaCanvasScale } from "./LunaCanvasScaleContext.jsx";

(Adjust path if your folder layout differs.)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

2) useSyncedPreviewScrollbar — add at start of hook
---------------------------------------------------
  const layoutScale = useLunaCanvasScale();
  const toLayoutPx = layoutScale > 0 ? 1 / layoutScale : 1;

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3) useSyncedPreviewScrollbar — after getPreviewScrollbarTrackGeometry(...)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Change destructuring to let, then convert viewport -> layout:

    let { trackTop, trackHeight: trackHeightBase } =
      getPreviewScrollbarTrackGeometry(list, gutter, strip);
    trackTop *= toLayoutPx;
    trackHeightBase *= toLayoutPx;

Add toLayoutPx to the useCallback dependency array for update:

  }, [previewListRef, gutterRef, previewStripRef, toLayoutPx]);

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

4) LunaSidebar (or equivalent) — scrollbar remeasure when scale changes
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  const layoutScale = useLunaCanvasScale();
  const scrollbarSyncKey =
    `${expanded}-${items.length}-${activePreviewId}-${layoutScale}`;

(Pass scrollbarSyncKey into useSyncedPreviewScrollbar as you already do with
syncKey so layout runs again when scale changes.)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

5) handleRuleThumbPointerDown — track height + drag delta
----------------------------------------------------------
After getPreviewScrollbarTrackGeometry for track height only:

    let { trackHeight: trackHeightBase } = getPreviewScrollbarTrackGeometry(
      list,
      gutter,
      strip,
    );
    const inv = layoutScale > 0 ? 1 / layoutScale : 1;
    trackHeightBase *= inv;

In the pointermove handler, use:

    const dy = (ev.clientY - startY) * inv;

Set useCallback deps to include layoutScale:

  }, [layoutScale]);

handleRuleTrackPointerDown (click track to jump): left unchanged — ratio of
click Y to track rect height is the same in screen space.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

6) LunaCanvasScaleContext.jsx (full file in this repo)
------------------------------------------------------
import { createContext, useContext } from "react";

export const LunaCanvasScaleContext = createContext(1);

export function useLunaCanvasScale() {
  return useContext(LunaCanvasScaleContext);
}

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

7) Provider (concept)
----------------------
Where you compute artboard scale S, wrap the subtree that contains the sidebar:

  <LunaCanvasScaleContext.Provider value={S}>
    ... sidebar ...
  </LunaCanvasScaleContext.Provider>

If you omit the provider, useContext returns the default 1 — scrollbar math
matches the old behavior (no transform scale).

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CSS
---
No CSS changes were required for the scale fix. The custom scrollbar still uses
classes like .sidebar-drawer-rule-gutter, .sidebar-drawer-rule-scrollbar,
.sidebar-drawer-rule-scrollbar__thumb, and :root --drawer-scrollbar-* vars
in LunaSidebar.css.

==================================================================================
End of port notes.
